positive: Minimalist, stylized depiction of a constellation formed by abstract elements, like glowing geometric lines and scattered stars. The central subject is a crescent moon radiating soft, ethereal light, embraced by two stylized, intertwined animals (e.g., a wolf and a deer) forming a symmetrical silhouette. The composition should be highly centered, featuring bold, clean vector lines against a deep, midnight blue-to-teal gradient background. Use negative space effectively to make the silhouettes pop. The style should blend abstract geometry with nature motifs, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, clean lines, graphic novel style, high detail.
